response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like Docker and AWS — directly matching the required stack — plus demonstrable AI-agent infrastructure work and a strong track record of end-to-end ownership, testing rigor, and process improvement.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow development experience
Strong DevOps and testing culture (Docker, CI/CD, Vitest/Jest equivalents)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
German language proficiency is basic, may hinder local collaboration
Diverse background includes many legacy/edge technologies (DLang, Ember) which may distract from focus
